title: Inspect heavy vehicle battery storage systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect heavy vehicle battery storage systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

pcs.text: Task instructions are interpreted and vehicle to be worked on is identified1.2 Inspection information is accessed and interpreted1.3 Potential hazards and risks associated with task are identified and reported to workplace supervisor1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability
